mapper.select: SELECT i.*, p.product_name, w.warehouse_name FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id ORDER BY i.last_update DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, warehouse_id, quantity, last_update) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_update = NOW()
